subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the All-Merciful to draw the hearts of His servants unto the horizon whence hath shone forth the Sun of divine knowledge, by His command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لیجذب افئده العباد الی افق منه اشرقت شمس العرفان امرا من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
